overallAssessment: The agent emitted multiple concrete operational values in structured schema fields that are not grounded in the upstream source context. Specific auth mechanisms (Bearer Token), protocol details (HTTPS/TLS), and data formats (JSON/Metadata) were committed to without upstream mandates. These constitute parameterization-A fabrications: concrete implementation commitments in fields whose structural position implies binding downstream contracts. The source context provides only category-level guidance on integration patterns, not specific protocol or auth selections.
